name: Iron Plating
description: Increases carriage health and reduces collision and melee damage.

name: Guard Training
description: Improves the swordsman's health, movement, and melee damage.

name: Mounted Ranged Slots
description: Improves mounted ranged guard stats and unlocks a second carriage slot at level 3.

name: Reinforced Wheels
description: Raises route speed and reduces mud slowdown.

name: Cargo Straps
description: Reduces cargo loss from mud, crashes, and bandit theft.

name: Emergency Repair Kit
description: Adds a once-per-route repair ability that restores carriage health.
